ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_index" INTEGER /* Index number associated with the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter country code */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the indicator is associated with */,
  "mu_j" REAL /* Mean value of the indicator for the region */,
  "mu_i" REAL /* Mean value of the indicator for the country */,
  "sigma_i" REAL /* Standard deviation for the indicator at the country level */,
  "sd" REAL /* Standard deviation for the indicator at the region level */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit in which the indicator is measured */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the indicator was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and application */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the statistical model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* JSON or text field for storing model parameters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used for generating results */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the results pertain to */,
  "forecasted_value" REAL /* Forecasted value generated by the model */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value observed for comparison */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES statistical_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES statistical_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator the entry pertains to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "source_document" TEXT /* Reference to the document or file where the data was sourced */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Rating of the data quality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
